## Community Data Submission

Thanks for contributing!

This PR is used for review only. Maintainers will usually close this PR without merging, because accepted data will be imported directly into TankFlare.

When your data is added to TankFlare, your PR will receive the `imported! 🥳` label and a confirmation message.

If your data is not accepted, maintainers will explain why.

## Related Issue

The issue number is located next to the title of the issue you are working on.

Related to #

Do not use `Closes #`, `Fixes #`, or `Resolves #` unless a maintainer asks you to.

## Submission Checklist

* [ ] I solved an existing issue or created a new issue, and I followed the steps in the [contributing guide](https://github.com/Omo-star/tankflare-community/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
* [ ] The submitted data follows the project format shown in the template guide linked in the issue.
* [ ] The submitted data follows the [original content guidelines](https://github.com/Omo-star/tankflare-community/blob/main/ORIGINAL-CONTENT-GUIDELINES.md).
* [ ] I understand this PR may be closed without being merged.
* [ ] I am okay with maintainers importing, modifying, or rejecting this submission according to the project rules.
